result.instructions: Keel adds production-grade resilience (retry, backoff, timeout, breaker, rate limit, cache) and durable flows to this project with zero code changes; policy lives in keel.toml. Every tool's text result is byte-identical to the matching CLI --json output: get_status = `keel status --json`, get_doctor_report = `keel doctor --json`, propose_policy = `keel init --diff --json` (an applyable keel.toml patch — never writes), list_flows = `keel flows --json`, get_trace = `keel trace <flow> --json`, explain_error = `keel explain <code> --json`. Outputs are deterministic (sorted keys, no timestamps), so two calls can be diffed to see real change.

tools.description: Explain a KEEL-E0NN error code: what happened, why, and what to do next. Byte-identical to `keel explain <code> --json`.
tools.name: explain_error

tools.description: The honesty report: what is wrapped, what is visible but unwrapped and why, adapter pins, policy validity, and the journal backend — findings carry applyable fixes where possible. Byte-identical to `keel doctor --json`.
tools.name: get_doctor_report

tools.description: One screen of what Keel is doing for this project: coverage, calls, retries saved, breaker opens, cache hit rate, and durable-flow counts. Byte-identical to `keel status --json`.
tools.name: get_status

tools.description: Trace one durable (Tier 2) flow step by step: outcomes, attempts, timings. Byte-identical to `keel trace <flow> --json`.

flow.description: A flow_id, or a substring of an id/entrypoint that names exactly one flow.

tools.name: get_trace

tools.description: List durable (Tier 2) flows: id, entrypoint, status, steps done/total. Byte-identical to `keel flows --json`.

dead.description: List only dead flows (those that exhausted their resume cap).

tools.name: list_flows

tools.description: Propose policy changes as a keel.toml diff from static + observed evidence (never writes): an applyable unified patch plus structured changes. Byte-identical to `keel init --diff --json`.
tools.name: propose_policy

content.text:
{
  "code": "KEEL-E014",
  "docs": "https://keel.dev/errors/KEEL-E014",
  "name": "non-idempotent-not-retried",
  "next": "If the API supports idempotency keys, configure `idempotency = { header = \"...\" }` for the target; then retries become safe.",
  "what": "The call failed with a retryable error, but Keel did not retry it because repeating it is not provably safe.",
  "why": "Level 0 hard rule: non-idempotent calls (e.g. POST without an idempotency key) are observed, never retried."
}

error.message: Unknown tool: "get_everything". Available tools: explain_error, get_doctor_report, get_status, get_trace, list_flows, propose_policy.
Method not found: "resources/list". This server supports initialize, ping, tools/list, and tools/call.
